prerequisites: An Everhour account on a paid plan, which is required to use the Everhour API.
An Everhour API key, generated from the Everhour web app.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Everhour authenticates each request with an API key sent in the X-Api-Key HTTP header. Provide this value in the connector's required api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Confirm a paid Everhour plan
setupSteps.body: The Everhour API is available only to accounts on a paid plan. Make sure your account is on a paid plan before generating an API key.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Everhour web app and locate your API key in your account. Copy this key.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the required api_key field to your Everhour API key. The connector sends it as the X-Api-Key header on each request to authenticate with the Everhour API.

sources.title: Do you have an API available? - Everhour Support
